sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports constant pain in the left back. The patient reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports feeling nauseous. The patient expresses a preference for french fries.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure readings were sometimes in the one forties. The patient denies chest pain.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a history of kidney stones. The patient has a history of diabetes. The patient is in so much pain.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Start metformin daily. Order follow-up with nephrology to evaluate the kidney stones. Schedule a return visit in one week to assess improvement in pain and nausea.
